services.name: Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory)
services.description: Cloud-based identity and access management service. Provides SSO, MFA, conditional access policies, identity protection (risk-based sign-in detection), privileged identity management (PIM), and application registration. The identity backbone for all Azure and Microsoft 365 services.

services.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
services.description: Unified cloud security posture management (CSPM) and cloud workload protection platform (CWPP). Free tier provides security recommendations and secure score. Paid plans add threat protection for VMs, containers, databases, storage, App Service, Key Vault, Resource Manager, and DNS. Supports multi-cloud (AWS, GCP).

services.name: Microsoft Sentinel
services.description: Cloud-native SIEM and SOAR platform built on Azure Log Analytics. Collects data from Azure, on-premises, and multi-cloud sources via 300+ data connectors. Uses KQL for threat hunting, built-in analytics rules, ML-based incident detection, and automated response playbooks (Logic Apps).

services.name: Azure Key Vault
services.description: Centralized cloud service for securely storing and managing secrets, encryption keys, and certificates. Supports software-protected and HSM-protected keys (FIPS 140-2 Level 2/3). Integrated with Azure services for transparent encryption. Provides access policies and RBAC for fine-grained control.

services.name: Azure Policy
services.description: Service for creating, assigning, and managing policies that enforce rules and effects on Azure resources. Policies can audit, deny, deploy, or modify resources to maintain compliance. Built-in policy initiatives map to CIS, NIST 800-53, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, and other frameworks.

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Comprehensive monitoring platform for collecting, analyzing, and acting on telemetry from Azure and hybrid environments. Includes Log Analytics (log queries), Metrics (time-series data), Alerts (notifications and actions), Application Insights (APM), and Workbooks (visualization).

services.name: Microsoft Purview
services.description: Unified data governance and compliance platform. Includes Data Map (automated data discovery and classification), Data Catalog (searchable metadata), Information Protection (sensitivity labels), Data Loss Prevention (DLP), Compliance Manager (assessment tracking), and Insider Risk Management.
keyFeatures: Sensitivity labels across Microsoft 365 and Azure

services.name: Azure DDoS Protection
services.description: DDoS mitigation service with two tiers. Basic tier provides automatic L3/L4 protection for all Azure resources at no cost. Standard tier adds advanced mitigation for VNet resources, real-time attack metrics, diagnostic logs, cost protection, and access to the DDoS Rapid Response team.

services.name: Azure Firewall
services.description: Managed, cloud-native network security service that protects Azure Virtual Network resources. Provides stateful firewalling with built-in high availability, unrestricted scalability, FQDN filtering, network rules, threat intelligence-based filtering, and TLS inspection (Premium SKU).

services.name: Azure Front Door with WAF
services.description: Global load balancer and CDN with integrated Web Application Firewall. WAF policies protect web applications against common exploits (OWASP Top 10), bots, and DDoS at the edge. Custom rules support rate limiting, geo-filtering, and IP restriction. Azure-managed rule sets are regularly updated.

services.name: Azure Private Link
services.description: Enables private access to Azure PaaS services, customer-owned services, and Microsoft partner services over a private endpoint in your VNet. Traffic stays on the Microsoft backbone network and never traverses the public internet, eliminating data exfiltration risks.
keyFeatures: Access to PaaS over private IP

services.name: Azure Bastion
services.description: Fully managed PaaS service that provides secure RDP and SSH access to virtual machines directly through the Azure portal over TLS. Eliminates the need for public IP addresses on VMs and removes the attack surface associated with managing jump boxes.
keyFeatures: No public IP required on VMs

services.name: Azure Confidential Computing
services.description: Protects data in use through hardware-based Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs). Supports Intel SGX enclaves, AMD SEV-SNP confidential VMs, and confidential containers. Data remains encrypted in memory during processing, protecting against privileged access attacks.

services.name: Azure Network Watcher
services.description: Network monitoring and diagnostics service for Azure. Provides NSG flow logs, packet capture, IP flow verify, next hop analysis, connection troubleshoot, and traffic analytics. Essential for network visibility, troubleshooting, and security analysis.

services.name: Azure Application Gateway
services.description: Regional L7 load balancer with optional WAF v2 integration. Provides SSL/TLS termination, cookie-based session affinity, URL-based routing, and multi-site hosting. WAF v2 provides OWASP Core Rule Set protection, custom rules, and per-site/per-URI policies.

services.name: Microsoft Defender External Attack Surface Management
services.description: Continuously discovers and maps the external attack surface of an organization. Identifies internet-facing assets, shadow IT, and exposed resources that may not be known to security teams. Provides risk scoring and vulnerability insights for discovered assets.

services.name: Azure Managed Identities
services.description: Provides Azure services with an automatically managed identity in Entra ID. Eliminates the need for credentials in code. System-assigned identities are tied to a resource lifecycle. User-assigned identities can be shared across multiple resources. Used for authenticating to Azure services securely.

services.name: Azure Resource Locks
services.description: Prevents accidental deletion or modification of critical Azure resources. Two lock types: CanNotDelete (allows reads and updates but prevents deletion) and ReadOnly (prevents any changes). Applied at subscription, resource group, or individual resource level with inheritance.

services.name: Microsoft Defender for Identity
services.description: Cloud-based security solution that uses on-premises Active Directory signals to identify, detect, and investigate advanced threats, compromised identities, and malicious insider actions. Detects credential theft (pass-the-hash, pass-the-ticket), lateral movement, and domain dominance attacks.

services.name: Azure Blueprints (deprecated) / Deployment Stacks
services.description: Azure Blueprints (now deprecated in favor of Deployment Stacks and Template Specs) defined repeatable environments with ARM templates, policies, RBAC, and resource groups. Deployment Stacks provide managed resource lifecycle, deny settings to prevent tampering, and deletion controls for governed deployments.
